summary: Full testing of variant-first search page feature completed. All 12 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI tests confirm: search page loads with required elements (search input, back button, clear button), discovery sections display when query is empty (Trending Variants, Rare Variants), typing 'charli' shows variant results within debounce period, variant cards link to /vinyl/{artist}/{album}/{variant} routes, clear button works correctly. Navbar search navigation code verified (onClick={() => navigate('/search')).
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: GET /api/search/variants?q=charli+brat returns variants array with discogs_id, artist, album, variant, cover_url, slug fields
PASS: GET /api/search/variants?q=taylor returns Taylor Swift variants (sorted by relevance)
PASS: GET /api/search/variants?q=pink returns color-matching variants (variant field matching 'pink' prioritized)
PASS: GET /api/search/variants?q=xxyyzz99999 returns empty results gracefully (no 500 error)
PASS: GET /api/search/discover returns trending, rare, most_wanted, recently_added arrays with slug fields
PASS: Discovery items have all required fields (discogs_id, artist, album, variant, slug)
PASS: /search page renders with search input (data-testid='search-input')
PASS: Clear button correctly hidden when input empty, appears when typing
PASS: Empty search shows discovery sections (data-testid='discover-sections') with Trending Variants, Rare Variants
PASS: Typing 'charli' shows variant results section (data-testid='search-variants') with 2 results
PASS: Variant cards link to /vinyl routes (e.g., /vinyl/charli-xcx-billie-eilish/guess/standard)
PASS: Clear button clears input and returns to discovery sections
PASS: No results state (data-testid='no-results') shown for nonexistent search query
CODE VERIFIED: Navbar.js lines 128-129: Desktop search button onClick={() => navigate('/search')
CODE VERIFIED: Navbar.js lines 229-231: Mobile search button onClick={() => navigate('/search')
CODE VERIFIED: App.js line 156: Route path="/search" renders SearchPage
test_credentials: Search endpoints do not require auth. Unable to test logged-in navbar navigation due to unknown test credentials - code verified instead.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing records collection (138+ records)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Variant-first search page feature fully tested. Backend endpoints /api/search/variants and /api/search/discover work correctly. Frontend SearchPage.js renders properly with all data-testid attributes. Navbar search icons (nav-search-btn, mobile-search-top) correctly navigate to /search route via onClick={() => navigate('/search')). Discovery sections aggregate from records, discogs_releases, and iso_items collections. Variant cards use slugified URLs format /vinyl/{artist}/{album}/{variant}.

verified: Required fields: discogs_id, artist, album, variant, cover_url, slug
Returns trending, rare, most_wanted, recently_added arrays
